CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-19-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT TECHLINK SYSTEMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED as to both causes of action. Both claims are adequately pled. The Labor Code claim is governed by a three year limitations period. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
